name: Duo Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures Duo access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT d.id, d.username, d.email, e.termination_date FROM duo_users d JOIN employees e ON LOWER(d.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND LOWER(COALESCE(d.status, '')) = 'active'
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
